market_context:
Cohort size: 50 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £104.90
Median 90-day occupancy: 48.9%
Median photo count: 23

title_variants: Spacious 3‑Bedroom Suite Steps from Ponds Forge
Juliette Balcony Luxury Apt, Secure Parking
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Experience the height of city‑side luxury in this spacious three‑bedroom apartment on Fitzalan Square, just minutes from the Ponds Forge International Sports Centre. The open‑plan living area greets you with three 65” 4K Smart TVs, fast Wi‑Fi and a sleek, fully equipped kitchen ready for gourmet meals. Both the living room and the master bedroom open onto charming Juliette balconies that flood the space with natural light. 

Three beautifully styled bedrooms comfortably sleep up to eight guests: the master boasts a king‑size bed, wardrobe and its own balcony; the second bedroom offers a king‑size bed, wardrobe and a handy workspace; the third bedroom features a cozy double bed. A modern bathroom features a walk‑in shower, contemporary fixtures and ample mirrors. 

Parking is a breeze with a discounted, secure spot at Q‑Park Riverside—75% off for guests who pre‑book. The apartment is stocked with essentials such as hairdryer, premium toiletries, fresh linen, extra pillows, blackout blinds, and a full set of entertainment options. Whether you’re visiting for sport, business, or leisure, this elegant, well‑appointed home provides everything you need for a memorable Sheffield stay.
top_amenity_gaps: Essential welcome kit (coffee/tea, basic pantry items)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright living‑room image showing the Juliette balcony as the cover photo—it showcases the open layout, luxury finishes, and a key differentiator in a single glance.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £191.4 (82% above the £104.90 median) to improve the 90‑day occupancy, which is currently only 38% versus the market 48.9% median.
Add high‑impact amenities such as air conditioning and a tumble dryer, and provide a basic essentials kit, to close the most noticeable gaps compared with competitor listings.
Increase the photo count from 16 to at least the market median of 23 and reorder so the living‑room balcony shot leads, adding a few lifestyle images of the neighbourhood and amenities.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is 82% higher than the city median, yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at just 38% versus a 48.9% market average.
